content: To determine the number of vans needed, you need to know how many people each van can hold. If you provide the capacity of each van, I can help you calculate the number of vans required. For example, if each van holds 7 people, they would need 5 vans for 30 people (25 students + 5 adults).
raw_content: To determine the number of vans needed, you need to know how many people each van can hold. If you provide the capacity of each van, I can help you calculate the number of vans required. For example, if each van holds 7 people, they would need 5 vans for 30 people (25 students + 5 adults).
